message:
feat(http): add proxy, cookie, multipart, pool reuse + fix redirect query-slash bug

RainyStone: proxy (HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS5), cookie jar, multipart form-data,
connection pool reuse, request/response builders.
SapphireHill: fix resolve_redirect rfind('/') searching query string when
resolving relative paths (e.g. ?return=/home caused wrong base path).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
